texts.label: empty_value
texts.text: 1960s . The first of these was a 25-year-old woman who had been raped by her husband while they were driving home from work . She told the police that she had been raped with a metal rod , and that he had then beaten her to death with it . When the police found the body in the back seat of their car , they discovered that the rod was made of lead .
